mapper.insert: insert into batch.job_partition ( tenant_id, job_instance_id, partition_no, partition_key, partition_status, worker_group, worker_code, lease_expire_at, retry_count, business_key, idempotency_key, input_snapshot, output_summary ) values ( #{tenantId}, #{jobInstanceId}, #{partitionNo}, #{partitionKey}, #{partitionStatus}, #{workerGroup}, #{workerCode}, #{leaseExpireAt}, #{retryCount}, #{businessKey}, #{idempotencyKey}, #{inputSnapshot,jdbcType=VARCHAR}::jsonb, #{outputSummary,jdbcType=VARCHAR}::jsonb )
mapper.update: update batch.job_partition set partition_status = #{retryingStatus}, retry_count = #{retryCount}, worker_code = null, lease_expire_at = null, finished_at = null, version = version + 1, updated_at = current_timestamp where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and id = #{id} and version = #{expectedVersion}
mapper.select: select * from batch.job_partition where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and partition_status in (#{readyStatus}, #{runningStatus}) and lease_expire_at is not null and lease_expire_at < current_timestamp order by id asc
select * from batch.job_partition where partition_status in (#{readyStatus}, #{runningStatus}) and lease_expire_at is not null and lease_expire_at < current_timestamp order by id asc
mapper.update: update batch.job_partition set partition_status = #{readyStatus}, worker_code = null, lease_expire_at = null, started_at = null, finished_at = null, version = version + 1, updated_at = current_timestamp where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and id = #{id} and version = #{expectedVersion}
mapper.select: select count(1) from batch.job_partition where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and partition_status in (#{waitingStatus}, #{readyStatus}, #{runningStatus}, #{retryingStatus})
